intro.title: Touching the Future
intro.subtitle: CAPI CAREER PATH SIMULATOR
intro.blurb: Capi will scan your way of thinking through 17 quick questions, drop you into a 20-question simulation mission, and decode your Capi-Gene — your career signature.
intro.new_title: You have been summoned to the Capi Research Institute
intro.new_blurb: Welcome to the Capi Research Institute! I am Capi, your assistant. Before stepping into the virtual reality simulation gates, let me run a preliminary scan on your thinking system. Ready?
intro.footer_hint: Complete the first scan to unlock virtual reality simulation gates.
intro.scan_intro_blurb: You will answer 15 questions on a 1-5 scale. Please choose based on what you actually do, not what you think is the "correct choice".

common.select_challenge: Choose the challenge you want to start.
common.role_modal_title: CHOOSE THE ROLE YOU WANT TO BECOME MOST

ark_capi.subtitle: New Planet Signature
ark_capi.blurb: Year 20xx. Earth is depleted of resources. You operate the giant Ark-Capi spaceship to find the 'Eternal Planet'.

techno.subtitle: A Day in STEAM
techno.blurb: You are an intern at S4V Group, directly handling Smart Home, Autonomous Logistics, and Drone network projects.

explorer.tagline: Discover the truth and find the core issue.

builder.tagline: Build solutions and bring ideas to life.

operator.tagline: Run, deploy, and keep systems operating smoothly.

connector.tagline: Unite teams and bridge opportunities together.

communicator.tagline: Tell stories that make tech accessible to everyone.

save_status.success: ✓ Saved to your account. You can review this in "History".
save_status.skipped: You're not signed in — this result won't be saved.

error_boundary.title: Capi crashed
error_boundary.body: An unexpected error just occurred. You can restart to keep going — any results you saved earlier are still safe in your account.

questions.Q1: When a robot has an issue, I want to directly inspect and repair it.
questions.Q2: I patiently test repeatedly and adjust each part to make the robot work better.
questions.Q3: I am interested in technical components such as sensors, motors, and control circuits.
questions.Q10: I like to learn how a new technology works.
questions.Q11: I often try multiple different approaches when solving a problem.
questions.Q12: When facing a problem, I like to investigate various possibilities before deciding on the root cause or solution.
questions.Q19: During robot development, I usually prioritize ensuring system stability and control over quickly testing new ideas.
questions.Q20: I often pay attention to the system's operational workflow and how components link to avoid confusion or errors.
questions.Q21: I like to optimize the system to reduce latency, minimize errors, and improve operational efficiency.
questions.Q28: I often help team members understand each other and coordinate better.
questions.Q29: I like to discuss with many people to find the most suitable solution for the whole team.
questions.Q30: I often take the initiative to connect members so everyone can work more productively.
questions.Q37: I like to present my ideas to others clearly and persuasively.
questions.Q38: I can explain a complex issue in a simple, easy-to-understand way.
questions.Q39: I like to prepare content to share ideas with others clearly and coherently.
questions.C1: I answer based on what I actually do, not what I think I "should select".
questions.C2: I am confident in my choices.

1.name: Smart Waste & Recycling
1.desc: The launchpad is stuck in storm debris. The Ark-Capi ship needs a massive clean energy source to power up.
goals: Design a river waste collection robot
Convert waste into energy crystals for the ship core.

2.name: AI Healthcare Assistant
2.desc: The medical system is overloaded as crew members fall ill. Design a smart clinic to automate triage and health monitoring.

3.name: Smart Home Project
3.desc: Set up a Smart Home ecosystem connecting home appliances. Tackle energy waste and optimize convenience.
goals: Build a smart security warning system.

4.name: Automated Warehouse Project
4.desc: Manage automated goods flow using robots in the warehouse. Minimize sorting errors and speed up order processing.

5.name: Drone Delivery Network
5.desc: Establish a high-speed drone delivery network in urban areas. Avoid complex obstacles and optimize safe flight routes.
goals: Optimize drone payload and battery life

6.name: Disaster Response Robot
6.desc: Deploy rescue robots into hazardous post-disaster zones. Search for signs of life and clear paths for the rescue team.
goals: Clear obstacles to open rescue paths
Transmit real-time camera feeds to the base.

reveal.capi_dialogue_suffix: ! Choose a simulation gate to let me see how you shine in practice!
reveal.disclaimer: * This is only a preliminary result. The official result will be calculated after you complete the mission.

theme.welcome_title: Welcome to the second stage of the game!
theme.welcome_subtitle: Select a mission theme and start exploring!
